data.name: 国民偶像 愛的解禁
data.detailed_description:
在櫻桃親親，我們的夢想是將日本最杰出的VN帶到全球。我們從著名的日本制作室Norn/Miel得到近200款VN的授權。這次我們將Tsundere Idol從英文翻譯到西班牙語。

Tsundere Idol 是一個關於日本學生和明星粉絲，Kota 和最流行的明星Rui Kurumizaka的故事. Kota和Rui居然還在同一學校，同一班。雖然他們同在一個開始，Kota非常的害羞，所以能每天見到Rui，他已經很高興了。可是一天發生意外，Rui手袋裡的色情雜志掉了出來! 為了替Rui保全面子，我們的英雄踏出來聲稱自己是雜志的物主。就這樣，我們的兩位角色產生了一段風流故事。

特點:
  • 原裝日本翻譯
  • 帶有日本語音和原本對話
  • 圖畫更改到可與16:9縱橫比兼容
  • 帶有超過一小時的故事
  • 原裝音效和音樂
  • 角色動畫升級

注意：Tsundere Idol原版游戲沒有任何成人內容，所有成人內容都在免費的成人補丁Tsundere Idol - 18+ Content。如果Tsundere Idol - 18+ Content沒有自動下載和安裝，請你手動安裝補丁。

請在我們的網站尋求更多有關游戲的資料並在Twitter關注我們。

data.short_description: Tsundere Idol 是一個關於普通學生，Kota 和明星，Rui Kurumizaka的故事。Kota非常的害羞並不敢跟Rui交朋友, 所以能在Rui的班級裡，Kota已經很開心. 可是有一天，Rui手袋裡的色情雜志突然掉了出來並讓Kota見到!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

data.name: Tsundere Idol
data.detailed_description:
Tsundere Idol is the story of Kota, a mild-mannered student in Japan who is a fan of the up and coming idol sensation Rui Kurumizaka. With a body built for breeding and the face of the most desirable Idol in all of Japan she's a thing of beauty.

Wouldn't you know it she happens to attend the same college and is in one of his classes! Too shy to approach the cool and popular Rui, Kota is happy just to be in the same classroom as her.

In class one day Rui accidentally spills the contents of her bag out on the floor revealing a naughty magazine!? Our hero steps up and claims ownership in order to save her the embarrassment of owning up to possessing such salacious literature. Now Rui is interested in making it up to Kota in every possible way...

Features:
  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Main female characters fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • All 18+ Content is included in the Steam download(No offsite patch required)

Tsundere Idol is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Tsundere Idol is a story of Kota, a mild-mannered student in Japan and idol sensation Rui Kurumizaka. Odd circumstances lead Kota to come to Rui's aid and shield her from an embarrassing situation. Rui now knows who Kota is, and is now indebted to the young man. How could she make it up to him?
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
